name: Leif [Bug-sized User]
description:
You woke up at the size of a bug. Fortunately, a friendly moth found you, and he's willing to help you.

(Art by ZinZoa)

This is a first for me. Since I'm low on bot ideas in general, I am going to take some of my macro/micro bots and make alternative versions of them where you and the character are the same size. So why not start with a bug?

This subseries of bots was inspired by my friend @sussus.

(January 13th, 2026 update: Added example dialogue as I forgot to do so before. Oops.)
creator: ReeRee457
